title: Introducing ChatGPT
summary: We’ve trained a model called ChatGPT which interacts in a conversational way. The dialogue format makes it possible for ChatGPT to answer followup questions, admit its mistakes, challenge incorrect premises, and reject inappropriate requests.
summaryZh: 我们训练了一个名为ChatGPT的模型，它以对话的方式进行交互。对话格式使ChatGPT能够回答后续问题，承认错误，质疑不正确的前提，并拒绝不适当的请求。
highlights: We’ve trained a model called ChatGPT which interacts in a conversational way.
The dialogue format makes it possible for ChatGPT to answer followup questions, admit its mistakes, challenge incorrect premises, and reject inappropriate requests.
highlightsZh: 我们训练了一个名为ChatGPT的模型，它以对话的方式进行交互。对话格式使ChatGPT能够回答后续问题，承认错误，质疑不正确的前提，并拒绝不适当的请求。
originalContentWarning: 该条资讯暂未抓取正文快照，当前保留了标题、摘要和原文链接。

title: DALL·E API now available in public beta
titleZh: DALL · E API现已推出公开测试版
summary: Starting today, developers can begin building apps with the DALL·E API.
summaryZh: 从今天开始，开发人员可以开始使用DALL · E API构建应用程序。
highlights: Starting today, developers can begin building apps with the DALL·E API.
highlightsZh: 从今天开始，开发人员可以开始使用DALL · E API构建应用程序。
